iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.CfnAbout: Creates a collection of standardized signals that can be reused to create vehicle models.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.Description.Description: (Optional) A brief description of the signal catalog.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.Name.Description: (Optional) The name of the signal catalog.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.NodeCounts.Description: (Optional) Information about the number of nodes and node types in a vehicle network.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.Nodes.Description: (Optional) A list of information about nodes, which are a general abstraction of signals.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.Tags.Description: (Optional) Metadata that can be used to manage the signal catalog.
